zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Whitston於1510年11月出生在英國亨廷格多史爾卻斯特頓時，她的父親William Whitston39歲，母親Joan Whetston35歲。她於1520年6月23日與Walter Goode在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1569年12月3日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾其斯同享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾卻斯特頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Whitston于1510年11月出生在英国亨廷格多史爾卻斯特頓时，她的父亲William Whitston39岁，母亲Joan Whetston35岁。她于1520年6月23日与Walter Goode在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1569年12月3日在英国英格兰可瓦爾其斯同享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾卻斯特頓。

nameMeanings.name: Whitston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Whitestone
meanings: English (Leicestershire) and Scottish: habitational name from Whitstone (Cornwall), Whitestone (Devon) or Whitestone Farm in Birdham (Sussex). In Scotland it may be from Whiteston (Perthshire) or Whitestone (Birse, Aberdeenshire), but the surname may not have survived in Scotland. The placenames derive from Old English hwīt ‘white’ + stān ‘stone’ or their later Scots equivalents. Alternatively, a variant of Whiston .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Whitston was born in November 1510, in Chesterton, Huntingdonshire, England, her father, William Whitston, was 39 and her mother, Joan Whetston, was 35. She married Walter Goode on 23 June 1520, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 December 1569, in Whitstone, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Chesterton, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Whitston est née en novembre 1510, à Chesterton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, son père, William Whitston, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan Whetston, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Goode le 23 juin 1520, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 décembre 1569, à Whitstone, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Chesterton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Whitston im November 1510 in Chesterton, Huntingdonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Whitston 39 und ihre Mutter Joan Whetston 35. Sie hat am 23. Juni 1520 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Walter Goode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Dezember 1569 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Whitstone, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chesterton, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Whitston è nata il nel novembre 1510 nel Chesterton, Huntingdonshire, England, sua padre, William Whitston, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Joan Whetston, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Walter Goode il 23 giugno 1520, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 dicembre 1569, nel Whitstone, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Chesterton, Huntingdonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Whitstonが1510年11月にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアチェステルトンで生まれた時，父William Whitstonは39歳，母Joan Whetstonは35歳であった。1520年6月23日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでWalter Goodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1569年12月3日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルウィトストーンで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアチェステルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Whitston(이)가 1510년 11월 영국 헌틴그도실르 체스터턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Whitston(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Whetston(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1520년 6월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Walter Goode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1569년 12월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 휘츠톤에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 체스터턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Whitston nasceu em novembro de 1510, em Chesterton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Whitston, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joan Whetston, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Goode em 23 de junho de 1520, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1569, em Whitstone, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Chesterton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Whitston родилась ноябрь 1510 г. в местности честиртон, хантингдоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Whitston было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Whetston, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Goode 23 июня 1520 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 декабря 1569 г. в местности уицтоун, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности честиртон, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Whitston nació en noviembre de 1510, en Chesterton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Whitston, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Joan Whetston, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Walter Goode el 23 de junio de 1520, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1569, en Whitstone, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Chesterton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
